result.reason: The application does not persist the state of currently open connections across restarts, leading to 'forgotten' sessions.
result.approach: Implement a mechanism to save the IDs/paths of open connections during application shutdown and restore them on startup. This will involve handling application close/open events in FrmMain, querying open connection IDs from ConnectionWindow, storing them in a new setting or a dedicated session file (using a new serializer), and then re-opening those connections on application launch.
